task: Transient 5xx errors from the payments API cause one-off charge failures. Add retry with backoff to PaymentsClient.charge() so transient errors are retried up to 3 times before failing.
correctness_argument: `range(3)` yields 0, 1, 2; `attempt == 2` correctly identifies the final attempt. On the third failure the exception is re-raised so callers detect the failure. On attempts 0 and 1 the error is caught and exponential backoff is applied before the next try.
